description.zh: 道具 / 图标工作台(规划中)· 目标:编辑游戏的 items.json + 像素 icon,接 2D 像素生图管线。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
description.en: Items & icons workbench (planned) — will edit a game's items.json + pixel icons and host 2D pixel-asset pipelines. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel implementation lands in a later sprint.
